CustomField.description: JSON snapshot of pre-rebalance Balance and LoanAmount values, written by FscLoanRebalanceOnce. Presence of a non-null value also acts as the idempotency marker for re-runs.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Set automatically by the FSC audit rebalance utility. Contains the pre-rebalance Balance and LoanAmount as JSON. A non-null value means this record has already been rebalanced; do not edit.
CustomField.label: Original Snapshot (JSON)
